serviceDescription: Amazon Elastic Block Storage (EBS) allows you to create persistent block storage volumes and attach them to Amazon EC2 instances.

templates.title: Amazon Elastic Block Storage (EBS)
templates.helpText: Amazon Elastic Block Storage (EBS) allows you to create storage volumes and attach them to Amazon EC2 instances. Once attached, you can create a file system on top of these volumes, run a database, or use them in any other way you would use block storage.

components.label: Storage for each EC2 instance Price
info alert
components.content: Volume type selected supports storage amounts 1 GB - 16 TB

==: Storage General Purpose gp3 GB Mo

components.label: info alert
components.content: Volume type selected supports storage amounts 1 GB – 64 TB per volume, 3,000 IOPS included with every volume with the option to provision up to a maximum of 80,000 IOPS per volume, and throughput of 125 MB/s included per volume with the option to provision up to a maximum of 2000 MB/s per volume.

components.label: info alert
components.content: Volume type selected supports storage amounts 4 GB - 16TB per volume and IOPS from 100 up to a maximum of 64,000 per volume.

==: Storage Provisioned IOPS io2 GB month

components.label: info alert
components.content: Volume type selected supports storage amounts 4 GB - 64 TB per volume and IOPS from 100 up to a maximum of 256,000 per volume. Only io2 block express supports volumes up to 64 TB and 256,000 IOPS.

==: Storage Throughput Optimized HDD GB Mo

components.label: info alert
components.content: Volume type selected supports storage amounts 125 GB - 16 TB per volume

==: Storage Provisioned IOPS io2 GB month
Storage Throughput Optimized HDD GB Mo

components.label: Provisioning IOPS per volume (io1)
components.apiDescription: Required only if the storageType is Provisioned IOPS
components.description: io1 supports from 100 IOPS to 64,000 IOPS per volume.

==: Storage Provisioned IOPS io2 GB month

components.label: Provisioning IOPS per volume (io2)
components.apiDescription: Required only if the storageType is Provisioned IOPS
components.placeholder: Enter amount of IOPS per volume
components.description: io2 supports from 100 IOPS to 64,000 IOPS per volume. Only io2 block express supports volumes up to 64 TB and 256,000 IOPS. Available in limited regions.

content.aws: This calculator does not enforce the IOPS to GB or IOPS to Provisioned Throughput ratios for gp3. The maximum ratio of provisioned IOPS to provisioned volume size is 500 IOPS per GiB. The maximum ratio of provisioned throughput to provisioned IOPS is .25 MiB/s per IOPS. For more information, see the General Purpose (gp3) user guide.

components.label: Provisioning IOPS per volume (gp3)
components.apiDescription: Required only if the storageType is General Purpose SSD (gp3)
components.description: gp3 supports 3,000 IOPS included per volume with the option to provision up to maximum of 16,000 IOPS per volume.
